items.title: Agriculture is ready for AI, but its data isn’t
items.description: Artificial intelligence is transforming what is possible in agriculture, but industry leaders should be wary of investing in AI without first laying the groundwork.  The use cases are promising, especially for an industry navigating volatile fertilizer costs, unpredictable weather, and margins that leave little room for error. items.title: The emergence of the web data infrastructure layer for AI
